programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 11

Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: Island Odyssey - EP 8
programme.desc: The hosts will form teams to travel to islands in Malaysia and Taiwan respectively to experience local life and see the most beautiful things from their own perspectives. They will be visiting Selangor, Tioman Island, Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Quarantine Island, Sarawak in Malaysia, and Kinmen, Matsu, Penghu Chimei and Xiaoliuqiu in Taiwan.

programme.title: The Glorious Pediatricians S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: The documentary captures the daily work of pediatricians and healthcare staff in major departments of Shenzhen Children's Hospital, including emergency pediatrics, cardiothoracic surgery, intensive care, neurosurgery, urology, orthopedics, endocrinology, and hematology oncology. It focuses on the common interactions between ordinary people and hospitals, using the life and work of pediatricians as a microcosm.

programme.title: Bravo, My Life - EP 8
programme.desc: (Dual Language Chinese and Korean) This series follows Xu Dongxi as she decides to raise her nephew as a single mother while struggling to establish herself as a designer.

programme.title: Devil-in-Law - EP 2
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) Wen Li proposed to Jia Nan to get married with her for 6 months, and she will show him Mdm Ruan and Jia Ling's true colours. If Wen Li can prove this to Jia Nan, he will give her full custody of Ling Er. Jia Nan agrees, as he wants to show Wen Li that his mother and sister are not as bad as she thinks.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 21
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Seeing that Meilan refuses to break up with Shixun, Najing proposes that she retaliate by sabotaging Zhengmin and Zhi-en's relationship.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 22
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) In a burst of anger, Meilan starts hurling things around the house when she suddenly receives an electric shock. To her surprise, the jolt restores the feeling in her legs.

programme.title: Hello Taiwan S9 - EP 9
programme.desc: Hello Taiwan strives to present the stories of people from all walks of life in the society. Through these ordinary people's attitudes towards life and work, viewers can witness the dedication and skills of these extraordinary and brilliant people.

programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Canxing tells Manyue of his latest dream, in which he saw Qingming waiting for her by the lake.

programme.desc: Rizki (Elryan Carlen) loses his memory and is rescued by Silvi (Larasati Nugroho). Silvi’s brother convinces her to marry Rizki, renaming him 'Dul.' When Rizki’s brother, Beno, finally finds him working as a humble farmer, another accident restores Rizki’s memory-leading him to realize he truly wants to marry Silvi after all.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 170
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Supir dan Majikan Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Ilen (Jennifer Eve) feels like she’s living a Cinderella story with her prince charming. However, her fairy tale turns into a nightmare when she discovers that her driver, Mario (Adhitya Alkatiri), is actually her ex-boyfriend, Bagas (Andrew Andika), in disguise.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 624
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 170
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Gak Pengen Jadi Ipar Pengennya Jadi Pacar
programme.desc: Wini (Indah Nicole) accidentally crashes her bike into Dito (Hardi Fadhillah), causing an 'injury' to his sensitive area. Feeling responsible for his future, Wini tries to match her sister with Dito. However, she soon realizes her own heart objects, she is secretly falling for the man she’s trying to marry off.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 624
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 119
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Senyuman Penyeimbang Tatanan Dunia
programme.desc: Kinan (Indah Nicole), a doctor who moved to a village to escape her stepfamily, is pickpocketed at the market. The thief hands the loot to Arman (Kevin Hillers), causing a massive fight between Kinan and Arman. They meet again when Kinan saves Arman’s younger sibling, forcing them to see each other in a new light.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 171
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Maling Hati Malah Kena Ulti
programme.desc: Fafa (Djihan Ranti) is rude to a driver named Trisno (Ridho Illahi) after an accident. She later discovers Trisno is the man who tends to her mother’s goats. Fafa flatly rejects an arranged marriage with him, insulting him for his 'goat-like' scent, leaving the hardworking Trisno heartbroken.

programme.title: Pepet Terus Kalau Suka Jangan Kasih Kendor

programme.title: TAK ADA ROTAN RINDU MENJADI
programme.desc: Ridwan (Rendy Kjaernett) refuses to join his mother’s rattan business, choosing to work elsewhere. After a fierce argument with a naive village girl named Sumi (Faye Nicole Jones) at a bus terminal, fate intervenes when Sumi saves Ridwan’s mother. Impressed, his mother hires Sumi, forcing a reluctant Ridwan to work alongside the girl he once called a thief.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 127
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kambing Daliman
programme.desc: he story begins with the success of Baskoro, a former film director who has just been elected as the Regent of Klaten. Daliman, a humble porter at Beringharjo Market, is overjoyed to see Baskoro on TV. Years ago, Daliman worked as an extra for Baskoro and even lent his goat to be slaughtered for a movie scene. Baskoro had promised to pay him back if the film succeeded, but unfortunately, the movie was a total failure. Now that Baskoro is in power, will Daliman get what he’s owed

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 179
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Definisi Mencintai Dalam Bacang
programme.desc: Thoriq (Cinta Brian), a handsome wonton vendor, reunites with his long-lost friend Aliyah (Jennifer Eve), who has returned from Germany with amnesia. It turns out her memory loss was caused by her ex, Beno, and his mistress, Cecil, who conspired to get her out of the way.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 633

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 16
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 8
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Cik Bunga Encik Sombong - EP 8
programme.desc: Tidak semena-mena Intan Asnidar yang menghantar bunga menjadi tunangan Harris Isqandar apabila gadis yang sepatutnya menjadi tunangannya melarikan diri. Apakah kesudahannya?

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 7
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 13
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 5
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 8
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Alang Menanti Malang - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 2
programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 1
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 9
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 19
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 33
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 17
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 9
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Pentas Haiwan
programme.desc: Kisah seorang guru yang menjadi guru sementara untuk mengajar kanak-kanak kelas lemah menghadapi cabaran daripada orang sekeliling dan juga pengetuanya.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 8
programme.desc: Jom lepak santai sambil sembang dan bergelak tawa bersama Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pak Ya dalam Warung Sepahtu selain turut menampilkan tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Sketso - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa komedi tentang pencegahan kemalangan untuk pekerja di bawa khas oleh Pertubuhan Keselamatan Pekerja Sosial (PERKESO)

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 20
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 6
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Meja Bulat Sepahtu - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai yang di hos kan oleh Sepahtu dengan pelbagai topik menarik dan terkini.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 8

programme.title: Ngaroot - EP 1
programme.desc: Polis Sentri ialah sebuah program variasi yang menampilkan 10 artis tanah air termasuk personaliti sosial media. Misi mereka adalah untuk berjaya dalam semua cabaran yang diberi.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI And PUTHU VASANTHAM Maha Sangamam
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- SUNDARA PANDIAN

programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 25
programme.desc: One morning, two men hold up a butcher's lorry and steal its load of meat. Alex quickly finds the thieves: recently arrived in the region they are ready to do whatever it takes to help those in greatest need. Their plan is to strike increasing-ly harder.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 66
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 2
programme.desc: Born to a mother from the Wendat Nation and a Guinean father, Aicha was raised in Wendake, Quebec, between African drums and Indigenous dances. A multidisciplinary artist, she defends her roots through her art and actions, and fights for the preservation of ancestral territories.

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 26
programme.desc: A bold young girl decides to go to the village where women aren't allowed. She heads off on horse-back. Once in the village, the witchdoctor announces the presence of a woman. But thanks to her quick-thinking horse, she manages to avoid being decapitated.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 15
programme.desc: Pokou and Yiblo join forces to fight a fire monster. But as they become exhausted the monster regains strength. Even angrier than before, it burns everything it finds in its way.

programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region - EP 25
programme.desc: Misleading names, scams, paid or unrecognized diplomas: the transition to higher education is not necessarily easy. Private schools have become very lucrative and it can be difficult to find a work-study program, as aid to host companies has decreased.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Petites Danseuses
programme.desc: What is life like for girls who dream of becoming prima ballerinas at the Paris Opera? Aged between six and ten, they dance with passion every day. But it is a real challenge growing up in a world with intensive work, demands and competitions at such a young age.

programme.title: Spoon
programme.desc: To escape everyday life and fulfill your dream, it's quite simple: you need a ladder and a spoon.

programme.title: Anushan
programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 8
programme.desc: To win his forgiveness, Julietta wants to join Francis at Saint-Isidore. Her visit will become a pretext for a family outing to Leon's childhood home...

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 9
programme.desc: Florence has to move to Trois-Rivieres and Leon would like to convince his parents to invite her to come and live with them. He is also very affected by Florence's feelings for Maggie.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 10
programme.desc: When Francis returns, Florence discovers the photos from his documentary. She and Julietta organise a surprise exhibition at the cafe. Everyone praises Francis' excellent work...

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 13
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Mauvaise Graine
programme.desc: Deprived of his favourite car by his father, a young idler joins a gang of car thieves. There he falls in love with the muse of the gang, but above all he must be wary of the kingpin who runs it. The first steps of a filmmaker destined to become one of Hollywood's greatest.

programme.title: Ya Benti
programme.desc: Sabrina, lesbian, is about to marry Younes, her childhood friend, who is also gay. A marriage that suits both of them because it reassures and delights their families. But on the eve of the ceremony, Sabrina begins to have doubts.

programme.title: Panier De Crabes
programme.desc: A city-dweller in his 30s, who is recovering from burnout, stops next to a wild lake. Whereas he thought that he had found solitude and tranquillity, the place turns out to be not as calm and isolated as it appeared.

programme.title: Vedi Sirippu
programme.desc: Don't miss this fun-filled talk show, along with a delightful blend of sketches, stand-up performances and humorous segments!

programme.title: Movie - Thaana Serndha Kotaam
programme.desc: Iniyan, a young man, aspires to be a CBI officer but gets rejected due to his inability to give bribes. However, he soon forms a gang which poses as CBI officials to raid the corrupt and expose them.

programme.title: Movie - Anwar
programme.desc: Anwar, a middle-class Muslim, falls in love with Mehru, a Hindu girl. Post her death, he is caught by the police and a misunderstanding leads them to believe that he is a terrorist.

programme.title: Movie - Thaai Naadu
programme.desc: Thaai Naadu is a 1997 Indian Tamil film directed by H. R. Bhargava and produced by S. Shankar. The film stars Vishnuvardhan, B. Saroja Devi, Srikanya and Geethanjali in the lead roles. The film had a musical score by Rajan-Nagendra.

programme.title: Movie - Yarukku Theriyum
programme.desc: Seven people regain consciousness and find themselves in a warehouse. Unfortunately, they do not remember how they got there.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Azhahi
programme.desc: A veterinarian recalls his childhood days when he fell in love with a girl who studied with him at school.

programme.title: Movie - Taj Mahal
programme.desc: A man sees a woman on her engagement day and they fall for each other. Later, her engagement is broken off due to some circumstances, but the enmity between their villages and family acts as a barrier to their budding relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Nandha
programme.desc: Nandha returns after serving his term for killing his father. Although he killed him to save his mother, she does not forgive him. He is then taken in by Periyavar, who shelters Sri Lankan refugees.

programme.title: Movie - Guna
programme.desc: Guna, a mentally-disturbed man, imagines a fictitious character of a woman to be his future wife. One day, he sees a girl in a temple and assumes that she is his imaginary love and kidnaps her.

programme.title: Movie - Neeya 2
programme.desc: After losing the love of her life two decades ago, a woman, who has the power to transform into a snake, sets out on a journey to try and reunite with him.

programme.title: Movie - Naanayam
programme.desc: Ravi is an electronics engineer who works in a bank and is in love with Nandini. Farid is a criminal who claims he can prove that Ravi has killed a man and blackmails him into robbing the bank.

programme.title: Movie - A Film By Aravind
programme.desc: Director Aravind and actor Rishi go on a road trip to find inspiration for their next film. However, they turn into real-life characters as a script dictates the events in their lives.

programme.title: Movie - Aadatha Aatemellam
programme.desc: Ashok and Sudha, two orphan siblings, are extremely affectionate towards each other. However, Ashok gets involved in a huge mess due to his drug addiction, and Sudha sets out to change his bad habits.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Mugamoodi
programme.desc: Bruce, a martial arts expert, is unable to fetch income using his skills. When Bruce helps the police arrest a few criminals, he inadvertently invites trouble from their gang leader, Dragon.

programme.title: Movie - A1
programme.desc: Divya, a casteist girl, dreams of marrying a gangster and falls in love with Saravanan without realising that he is from a different caste.

programme.title: Movie - Raja
programme.desc: Priya confesses her love to Raja, but he mistakenly falls for a girl with the same name. Years later, Priya re-enters his life and triggers a series of emotionally complicated situations.

programme.title: Movie - Gajini
programme.desc: Sanjay Ramaswamy, who is suffering from short-term memory loss, sets out on a quest to find the people who were responsible for his ladylove Kalpana's murder.

programme.title: Movie - Kutti Puli

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2008/2009 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 19
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 4
programme.desc: Gabby Agbonlahor sits down for 1-to-11 to reveal his ultimate Aston Villa lineup, made up of the teammates he played alongside. A true one-club man, Gabby reflects on his journey from academy prospect to first-team star, sharing stories of the players who made the biggest impact during his time at Villa Park. His Villa XI is full of character, quality, and claret-and-blue pride.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 37
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 37
programme.desc: Diego Gomez's path to the Premier League has been shaped across continents. Beginning his career in Paraguay, the midfielder earned a move to Inter Miami, where he developed his game alongside some of football's biggest names such as Lionel Messi. In 2025, Gomez made the switch to Brighton and the Premier League. Now on the South Coast, Gomez is establishing himself as an important part of the Seagulls' team.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 34
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 27 APR
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 19
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 27 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 34. Friday's game sees Sunderland host Nottingham Forest, Arsenal welcome Newcastle, Liverpool take on Crystal Palace, and Manchester United close out the round against Brentford.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 37
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 4
programme.desc: Gabby Agbonlahor sits down for 1-to-11 to reveal his ultimate Aston Villa lineup, made up of the teammates he played alongside. A true one-club man, Gabby reflects on his journey from academy prospect to first-team star, sharing stories of the players who made the biggest impact during his time at Villa Park. His Villa XI is full of character, quality, and claret-and-blue pride.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 34
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 3
programme.desc: With 481 Premier League appearances and five titles - Michael Carrick is a Premier League icon. Carrick sits down with Premier League Moments to look back over his glittering career - from the West Ham youth academy through to being a key figure in Sir Alex's Ferguson's Manchester United side. In addition to his Premier League career, he also reflects on winning the Champions League, Europa League, the FA Cup as well as his international career.

programme.title: FS MMA Tyler Jackson vs. Dmitri Samoilov
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Dmitri Samoilov from Russia, fights Canada's Tyler Jackson. These two slug it out for fight fans and leave the judges in St. Petersburg baffled.

programme.title: WCCB Osleys Iglesias vs. Vladimir Shishkin
programme.desc: From the Montreal Casino in Canada, the undefeated IBO Super Middleweight Champion, Osleys Iglesias, looks to defend his title against top-ranked Vladimir Shishkin. The bout will also determine the mandatory challenger for the IBF World Championship in the division, currently held by Canelo Alvarez. Both fighters are ranked inside the top 5 according to several world rankings, with Iglesias ranked #3 and Shishkin #2 in the world by the IBF.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 10: California, USA - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kajukenbo and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Throws with Masters Charles Gaylord and Greg Harper.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Adrien Broner vs. Martin Rodriguez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Adrien Broner taking on Martin Rodriguez to determine the new WBO super featherweight world champion. With both fighters looking for their first major world championship, one left hook will bring about a new champion. Also on the card, action from multi-weight champion Paul Williams and Verno Phillips.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Kagayaki, Shodai, Enho and Daieisho.

programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, interim WBC Light Heavyweight Champion David Benavidez meets WBA 'Regular' champion David Morrell.

programme.title: WCCB Tina Rupprecht vs. Eri Matsuda
programme.desc: Ffrom Heidelberg, Germany, a championship tripleheader takes place headlined by Tina Rupprecht of Germany and Eri Matsuda of Japan competing for the WBC and WBO Women's Atomweight World Championships. Also on the card will be undefeated World Champion Sumire Yamanaka, also of Japan, defending the IBF Atomweight World Title against Fabiana Bytyqi. Rounding out the card will a European Heavyweight Title clash featuring Oleksandr Zakhozhyi against Arnold Gjergjaj.Only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Houston Qualifier tackle the Houston Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Walking Bar, Crazy Cliffhanger and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Ricky Hatton vs. Paul Malignaggi
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of fighters who have just one loss to their record, as Ricky Hatton battles Paulie Malignaggi in a light welterweight championship bout that was billed as "Power vs. Precision." Also on the card, future heavyweight champion Tyson Fury battles with Steve Cunningham.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Tokushoryu, Yutakayama, Asanoyama and Shodai.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Team Form and Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Tashkent Grand Prix, we speak with one of Israel's fighters Sagi Muki about the importance of positivity in the face of adversity, and we stop to get to know Dzmitry Minkou, a young talent in the world of Judo.

programme.title: WCCB Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 93
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are outside in the cold when they spot the Tiddlytubbies who are warm, inside. The Teletubbies put on hats, gloves and scarves to keep warm.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 7
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'sheep' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different sheep - a white sheep, a baa-ing sheep, a leaping sheep and a noodle sheep.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Messy accidentally removes the brakes from Mayor Oki's carnival float, but it turns out he really needs them. Will Messy be able to stop the runaway float?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: Glitch's plan to use methane gas from a mud volcano to power Lars's new machine has explosive results! Can the bickering pair stop a huge fire and save the Grimbots?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 49
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey to mind her manners at the table - they're not animals. But when Bluey gets her hands on a stick of magic asparagus, she shows them everyone's got a wild side.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 52
programme.desc: It's the night before Easter and Bluey and Bingo are worried the Easter bunny is going to forget about them like last year.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to New Zealand on a baby animal mission to help rescue a family of blue ducks and their chicks from a fast flowing river. Along the way, Andy takes a ride on a pukeko chick and meets a hedgehog.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 25
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 24
programme.desc: Happy discovers his wobbly tooth has come out, but he's lost it! He's having a problem remembering where he was when it fell out.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 35
programme.desc: When a storm washes up plastic litter onto the Academy beach, the Go Jetters leave Ubercorn, Grandmaster Glitch and the cadets behind and head to the North Pacific Ocean in Jet Pad.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 34
programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 20
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: Sarah plans a surprise for when her hibernating tortoise wakes up.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 24
programme.desc: Cake is tired of living in the fridge, so Sarah & Duck help him think about where else he would like to stay.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 37
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hettie with a sleepover at the museum for some of the children. They do a treasure hunt and a night-time picnic, but antics ensue when they clean up after themselves.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 36
programme.desc: Stanley is called to pose as a model for the town's art club, but he's got lots of jobs on and won't stay still. Peggy and the gang must come up with a way to keep Stanley still.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Parties, presents, and lots of cake! The animals chat about everything they love about birthdays!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a spring clear out, but when Gran Gran wants to clear out her old jumper, JoJo is distraught - she loves that snuggly jumper!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 46
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 47
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 52
programme.desc: When Mole was young he wanted to be a Stunt Mole! Can Duggee and the squirrels help make his dreams come true?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 51
programme.desc: Duggee's uniform is a bit old and needs to be updated. Duggee can make his own clothes!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save a family of mountain gorillas from traps left by hunters and also from a sneezy Grandmaster Glitch's germs.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Parsnip performs a jaw dropping escape that will leave even Houdini speechless.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 50

programme.desc: Evil Pea plans to freeze Supertato into an ice cube by pretending to teach him to dance.

programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: In the final battle against Morando, Aja and Krel must make an unexpected sacrifice to win the day to save their Akiridion and Earthen homes.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Turbo and Whiplash meet a strange tick who may be out to harm Turbo.//When the crew starts a prank war, Chet is nervous that he is the next target.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: White Shadow quits racing and it's up to Turbo to convince him to get back on the track.//The crew becomes detectives and meets a strange new creature.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: Loy upgrades the house with a few seemingly helpful robotic enhancements. Archibald becomes a sock-puppet wrestling superstar.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings has done a beautiful painting to use in her Story-Time afternoon. But then Coco and Noddy discover it ruined! Coco thinks that Bling must have done it but she protests her innocence. Noddy investigates: who messed up the Queen's painting - and can he get it fixed again in time? Keep investigating, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: Deltoid accepts the Ninja's challenge to run around the loop-theloop. But when he fails on his first attempt, he feels ready to give up in despair. Noddy investigates: How can he help Deltoid do his challenge?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: The Knights set off on their patrol but are delayed by someone playing tricks on them. Noddy investigates: who's playing tricks on the Knights? He soon finds them in Fable Forest, waylaid by yet another cheeky trick. Noddy will have to find the culprit before the Knights end up in serious trouble!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: The railway tracks are being repaired all over Toyland by the Builders, so Farmer Tom, Tractor and a trailer are running a replacement service. But the repairs take longer than expected when the Builders' tools go missing. Noddy investigates, and finds that Cloppycorn loved the trailer rides so much that he hid the biolders' tools in a basket that Pat-Pat had asked him to take to the other Naughticorns.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: You see there was time when Vulture was not bald. Oh no, Vulture's head was covered in a beautiful crown of golden plumage! Vain Vulture never shut up about her golden feathers and was obsessed about making them ‘as golden as the sun!'. One day Vulture decides to fly up to the sun, but her precious feathers get burnt! Vulture decides to sooth her smoking feathers with golden honey which she steals from the bees. The bees are not pleased and Vulture sticks her head down Aardvark's burrow.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Giraffe didn't have a long neck. Her neck was all short and stumpy and she was a very delicate eater. All the food in Tinga Tinga seemed to make her tummy go funny. Then one day Lion suggests she try some honey. With the Bees permission, Giraffe tries to lick the honey… but it is deep, deep inside the tree.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 21
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Greendale, and Ted Glen has invited the kids to his workshop to meet his friend, space expert Professor Farrow. Julian's excited but so is Pat, who has always yearned to be an astronaut. He's even more thrilled when he finds that his special delivery is a space suit - an extra surprise for the kids. When his van breaks down in a snowy lane, he finds an ingenious solution - only to suffer a puncture - and Ted is unable to help...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 22
programme.desc: It's Chris Beacon's birthday and he's looking forward to spending the day onshore and having a party at the village hall. Pat's SDS mission is to pick up all the presents from everyone who won't be able to be at the party later.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 25
programme.desc: Breeze and Roary swap places for the day (and night). Roary soon discovers the beach is no place for a racing car to live, while Breeze misses the freedom of the beach.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: The cars are all gleaming for this evening's race. Roary gets bored and heads out onto the track - with disastrous consequences. Will the cars be ready in time for the big show?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: The track inspector is coming to visit and Big Chris is too tired to commentate on the race. A celebrity commentator is brought in to save the day - much to Big Chris' anger.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Christine is due to take part in a dancing competition and is practising at Silver Hatch. But what happens when her dance partner is taken ill?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: When Noddy comes to give Smartysaurus an invitation to Queen Sparklewings's picnic, there's a big pile of cabbages blocking her front door. Noddy investigates: who left the big pile of cabbages there and why? And will he be able to solve the case in time for the Royal Picnic?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: The Knights have been away travelling around Toyland and they each return with a special gift for the Queen. But the last Knight to arrive back was so busy having fun that he forgot to bring back a present for the Queen. Noddy assures him the Queen won't mind but the poor Knight is adamant he must give her something. Noddy sets out to help him find the perfect gift.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: When the Pockets find an old treasure map, the Pirates are delighted. They race off to find the treasure. Only to come back rather confused. They found a treasure chest but it ran away! Noddy investigates: "What's happened to the Pirates' treasure?"

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: Noddy and Big Ears come to Fable Forest to see the Queen Sparklewings's magic crystal collection. But when they arrive at the Fairy Castle, they find all the toys there frozen like statues. What's going on. It's up to Noddy to investigate and help his friends return to their normal selves.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Magnus's superpowered mechano-dragon threatens to replace the Riders. But when it spirals out of control, the town's real heroes have to step up!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: When Noddy comes to give Smartysaurus an invitation to Queen Sparklewings's picnic, there's a big pile of cabbages blocking her front door. Noddy investigates: who left the big pile of cabbages there and why? And will he be able to solve the case in time for the Royal Picnic?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: The Knights have been away travelling around Toyland and they each return with a special gift for the Queen. But the last Knight to arrive back was so busy having fun that he forgot to bring back a present for the Queen. Noddy assures him the Queen won't mind but the poor Knight is adamant he must give her something. Noddy sets out to help him find the perfect gift.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 47
programme.desc: When the Pockets find an old treasure map, the Pirates are delighted. They race off to find the treasure. Only to come back rather confused. They found a treasure chest but it ran away! Noddy investigates: "What's happened to the Pirates' treasure?"

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 48
programme.desc: Noddy and Big Ears come to Fable Forest to see the Queen Sparklewings's magic crystal collection. But when they arrive at the Fairy Castle, they find all the toys there frozen like statues. What's going on. It's up to Noddy to investigate and help his friends return to their normal selves.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Tag worries that she's no longer a "Go" dog, Lady Lydia helps her find a new persona by helping Tag try on a bunch of different hats. Luckily, when a runaway puppy needs to be wrangled, and only the speedy Tag can catch him, Tag realizes she was a Go dog all along. \ Sergeant Pooch reads Scooch, Tag and Kit a story book during their sleepover. But when the last pages are missing, the three kids work together to make up their own ending to the story.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Tag, Scooch and Kit think they found the perfect story for their newspaper: Bigpaw is in Pawston! But when they find out that Frank and Beans were lying to the town, they seek to uncover the truth and reveal it to everyone. \ When Sam Whippet sets up a pirate-themed race for the Race Cadets, pirate-loving Scooch takes on the role of captain. Tag struggles to take orders as first mate while helping Scooch navigate maritime obstacles and avoid the fearsome pirates.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When a meteor crashes into the Wrenchtools' home, the Dinotrux take them to safe ground; little do they know D-Structs is planning a giant attack.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Lucky gets into trouble when the circus picks up a stranded woman who isn't what she seems

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Eep gets jealous when Thunk is invited to join the hunters/Grug and Gran must work together after getting stuck to each other with sticky tree sap

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Grug has Thunk use "scare tactics" to get the Valley to defend against the Broods/Eep thinks Snoot is holding Ahhh! Valleyites captive in his cave

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Heather joins the Dragon Riders, but it's not an easy alliance, especially when Hiccup uncovers a shocking secret about her true identity.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders rescue a wounded Speed Stinger and take it back to Dragon's Edge, unaware of the dangers that follow.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Even worse;the playgroup’s other new member is Mega Fat;whose animatronic stuffie Wagby malfunctions and threatens the safety of the whole group. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: When the crowded bathroom situation at the local museum threatens baby love;Boss Baby leads his new team of playgroup babies on their first mission…and then their SECOND mission after a klepto baby in their group swipes a priceless artifact. In a continued attempt to avoid homework;Tim joins Boss Baby on his mission.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: When Fishlegs discovers a hidden civilization of Albino Night Terrors beneath Dragon's Edge, he must craft an escape plan after they attack the Riders.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: The team plans a heist in order to obtain the enchanted pendant that can lead them to the storm wheels. Elsewhere, Klaus and Veruca shipwreck on a mysterious island that is actually home to the mages, and also the Tianshang weapon helmet.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: Turbo competes in a crazy underground race through a mall.//Tito trades in his food truck for a tank and goes on a wild ride through the city.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Shadow and Skidmark embark on a perilous adventure through the zoo to rescue Deuce.//Whiplash attempts to keep the crew from meeting his parents.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: After pulling a sword from a tree, Sage is crowned king for the day. Archibald wins a fancy vacation aboard a luxury cruise.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Fuse asks Noddy to take a present to the Pockets. But when Noddy arrives at the Treehouse, he discovers he's carrying an empty box. The present, whatever it was, has gone! Noddy must investigate: where is the Pockets' present? But how will he ever find it when he doesn't actually know what it is? It's going to take all his detecting skills to solve this one!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: When Fuse invites his friends to come for a playdate all they want to do is play his new computer game. But then suddenly the computer goes off. He soon discovers there's a power cut affecting the whole of Brickabuild. But who switched off the power? And why? Desperate to carry on with the game, Noddy decides to investigate: how can they play Fuse's new game?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings asks the Pirate Captain to do the first dance with her at the Queen's Dance. But when it's time to practise, the Captain can't come: someone's stolen their treasure! Noddy decides to help find the treasure so the Captain will still be able to dance. He needs to investigate: Who stole the Pirates' treasure?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Porcupine didn't have quills, she had the softest coat in all of Tinga Tinga… and Jackal wanted it. Despite warnings from all the animals Porcupine allows Jackal to invite her to his cave to keep out of the rain. Porcupine takes off her coat to allow it to dry, but while she sleeps naughty Jackal runs off with it. When she awakes Porcupine is covered in lots of tiny ant bites and they itch and they itch and they itch.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Lizard didn't hide under rocks. He would scamper around Tinga Tinga pinching other animals food and keeping it all for himself. Then one day the animals decide to give greedy Lizard a dose of his own medicine. When Lizard realizes the error of his ways he runs and hides under a rock too ashamed to show his face in Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 23
programme.desc: The children are excited as there's a big Winter Snowdown on the fells.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 24
programme.desc: Hopes are high for this evening's hoe-down on Greendale's village green - especially among PC Selby and Ted, who each harbour hopes of dancing with Dr Gilbertson. Pat's mission is to deliver one of Ted's inventions, a mechanical horse or "bucking bronco", to the event. But when the bronco is accidentally switched on in the back of Pat's van, it rolls away and Pat can't find a way to recapture it. He enlists Amy's help, but jealous Pumpkin pushes the bronco away, making matters worse.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Tin Top just can't master corners no matter how hard he tries. The other cars try to help him to no avail… until Roary hits on a brilliant plan.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is planning on cutting down Flash's tree. What can be done to save the poor rabbit's home?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Conrod is visiting Silver Hatch to try out some new bio fuel. But Big Chris fears something is wrong with it after he comes out in spots after sampling a smoothie made from the same produce. What or who could be at fault?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The cars are having a football tournament down at the beach. FB learns that if he relaxes, his natural footballing skills will shine through.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 49
programme.desc: Noddy's delighted to be given a diabolo by Big Ears. But when Noddy tries it out for the first time, the diabolo crashes and breaks in two. Even worse, when Noddy goes to retrieve the two halves, he finds that they're both missing! Noddy needs to investigate. Where is his new toy?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 50
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings invites the toys to play a game of Catch the Flag at the castle. But when the special trophy goes missing, Noddy has to investigate. Where is the vanished trophy?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 51
programme.desc: When Train hears cows near the railway tracks, he's worried that he might scare them and he insists on going really slow. Trouble is there's a load of Builders on board who need to get to Brickabuild fast. Noddy decides to investigate. Where are the lost cows?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 52

programme.title: Dark Marvels - EP 5
programme.desc: From the world's largest trebuchet to Nazi super cannons, these are the deadly weapons that rain destruction and spread fear on the battlefield.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series - EP 5
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case murder of a young Marine who was killed in a hotel room and charge the woman who was with him at the time. Is she the mastermind behind his death or an innocent victim?

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 117
programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect might have acted in self-defence.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 104
programme.desc: When a Mobile mother of four is shot just blocks from her home, detectives look to her loved ones to identify her killer. But, at trial, his attorneys claim he acted in self-defence.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 509
programme.desc: When a man is found inside of a truck, stabbed 45 times, a bilingual Tulsa community comes together to help Detective Mark Kennedy identify the victim and track down his killer.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 6
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, MI, but her family and friends don't believe it. The police discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.desc: When Mary Scott is found murdered in her San Diego home in 1969, a case with few leads quickly loses steam. Years later, Mary's daughters grow determined to find answers about the mother they barely knew.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 156

programme.desc: With two transformations on one site, builder Dylan tries to retrofit a draughty cottage into a fully sustainable home while landscape architect Tylah's plans for a garden oasis are battered with financial constraints.

programme.title: Larapinta S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Talia visits Chambers Pillars, a national park established by Traditional Owners, to see how a dreaming site has been desecrated. What are the long-term implications of buffel grass devastating Central Australia's landscape?

programme.title: Four Corners (2026) - EP 11
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch (2026) - EP 12
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Stuff The British Stole S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Stephen Fry joins Marc Fennell on a gripping adventure, from the pinnacle of the Acropolis to a secluded robotics lab high in the Tuscan mountains to a shipwreck under the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 67
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.desc: James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, overnight developments, interviews and new details on the top stories this morning, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Lillian Rangiah with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 86

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 86
