programme.title: Ghosts of Saigon
programme.desc: As the Vietnam War neared its chaotic end, thousands of children were evacuated. Some arrived in Australia through Operation Babylift. This documentary traces the emotional journey of those adopted into Australian families.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Episode Four meets three emergency personnel at Queensland Ambulance Service each at different stages of their career, all driven to save lives, including trainee Call taker Melissa who is learning to take her first calls.

programme.desc: From South America to the Solomon Islands, Foreign Correspondent reveals the tactics used by cartels to send eye-watering quantities of drugs across the Pacific. We go on the hunt for the "narco subs" used by drug lords.

programme.desc: Chas and John cover the latest in American politics and global affairs, from the Middle East, trade, security and the economy, plus Donald Trump's upcoming visit to China to meet with Xi Jinping.

programme.title: National Press Club Address (2026) - EP 14
programme.desc: Hugh de Kretser, President of the Australian Human Rights Commission addresses the National Press Club of Australia on the topic "The Australian Human Rights Assessment 2026".

programme.desc: It’s Restaurant Wars and this season the perennial favorite returns with a twist! The chefs split into two teams of four and are tasked with developing restaurant concepts.

programme.title: Survivor S50 - EP 10
programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is "In the Hands of the Fans"! The players won’t know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17 - EP 5
programme.desc: After a young man is found shot to death on the banks of a Georgia river, investigators trace the murder back to individuals who share his Gothic lifestyle and uncover a romantic rivalry driven by manipulation.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5) - EP 73
programme.desc: Derek's thrilled to flip a 60-year-old house, but Chauncey's doubtful. Massive repairs-foundation, termites, plumbing-threaten profit and project completion.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 41
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a flavourful Korean-style taco with a spicy, soy-based recipe that perfectly combines salty and sweet ingredients.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 1
programme.desc: Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: Ruth and her husband Ed's tranquil life in Wichita, Kansas is suddenly turned upside down when Ed suffers a heart attack. While Ed is in the hospital, Ruth's starts to receive mysterious threats.

programme.title: Big Lies In A Small Town
programme.desc: Rachel searches for her daughter after their car crashed outside of a town. She gets closer to finding out that the town doctor kidnapped her. He and his wife never got over the loss of their daughter.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 10

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 39
programme.desc: When she was a child, Rachael's family often enjoyed fish-fry dinners in Cape Cod. Her mother served countless such meals in her restaurants, and now Rachael shows how to make the dish at home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 18
programme.desc: Vincent Yeow Lim or "DimSimLim" is today's Mystery Box special guest. Contestants must create a dish using a wok, needing to impress to avoid tomorrow's Pressure Test.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 2
programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth "pagoda" with precision knife work.

programme.title: Airline Wars - EP 1
programme.desc: Airline drama is at an all-time high and we've got the viral videos to prove it. See what happens when people are caught on camera acting up and acting out. We're headed for the not-so-friendly skies.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 5
programme.desc: After a dreamy night on the train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros hit the road again, uplifted by Mongolia's stunning scenery. But suddenly, Seok-hoon asks the driver to stop. Why?

programme.title: Girl In The Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: When Hannah is invited to popular Melissa's sleepover, she has no idea that she was invited as a prank. But when the night turns more sinister, Hannah's mother becomes her only hope for survival.

programme.title: All Fixed Up In An Empty Village (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: The long-awaited grand opening finally arrives. However, trouble strikes for Na-rae's team even before business begins. At the cafe, they face a shortage of cups.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: The Dokbakz arrive at one of the top attractions in Vang Vien, where travellers from all over the world gather: the Blue Lagoon, with its emerald-clear waters.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 88
programme.desc: Dolmar receives a tip on a home in the Palm River, so he and Amanda head over to scope it out. Even though the home has suspect additions and termite damage, Dolmar feels the deal is too good to pass on.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 19
programme.desc: The punk princess of pastry, Anna Polyviou returns with a Pressure Test created especially for this challenge. Never has an egg on toast looked so sweet - or intimidating - as Anna's "Sunny Side Up".

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 4
programme.desc: Food carving elevates delicacies to visual delights. From dragon made of carrot, taro and shrimps, to phoenix made of bottarga, Taiwanese Chef Liao Ching-chih morphs ingredients into flavorful spectacles.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: Giving Hope: The Ni'Cola Mitchell Story
programme.desc: Ni'Cola Mitchell, successful author, realises at a book signing that her calling is to help disadvantaged girls. She launches Girls Who Brunch, to make young women feel seen and empowered.

programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices "HELP" scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: All Fixed Up In An Empty Village (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: After the chaos, afternoon business begins-only to be met with an unexpected torrential downpour in Palbok-dong. Min-seok's team, the most vulnerable to the rain, faces an emergency.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: After finishing their sauna experience, the Dokbakz arrive at a traditional Lao-style hotpot restaurant, Shin Dat. There they can choose their own ingredients and create their own hotpot.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 89

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16) - EP 20
programme.desc: Today the Judges each demonstrate a microwave hack and task our contestants with creating an immunity winning dish incorporating one of them. Boundaries are pushed in a very creative cook.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 5
programme.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 67
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 23 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring the Unknown World "Africa" (R)
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world’s hidden secrets.

programme.title: Hello! NHK WORLD-JAPAN (R)

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 88
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 25 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Samurai Drama Selections "Crossing of Heat Haze" Ep. 1 (New) (R)
programme.desc: Based on the popular period novel series by Saeki Yasuhide, this drama follows Sakazaki Iwane, a gifted swordsman known for his calm grace. Once a samurai of the Bungo Sekimae domain, he abandons his clan after a tragic incident and lives as a ronin in Edo. Portrayed by Yamamoto Koji, Iwane is a gentle and compassionate warrior who upholds justice, in a richly entertaining period series filled with swordplay, romance, human drama, and humor.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan

programme.title: Kangsi Coming

programme.title: Hit the Headlines

"Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: TAKE MY WORD FOR IT - EP 16
programme.desc: This drama centres around the experiences of members of the Police Negotiation Cadre (PNC), a volunteer unit of the Hong Kong police force specialising in negotiations with terrorist members, partakers of local violence, as well as individuals contemplating suicide.

programme.title: Holistic Way+Ninjiom - Themis & What's On Today - EP 23
programme.desc: High Court judge Yan Huizhi investigates a case involving a 14-year-old boy linked to a child's death. Discovering that he had repeatedly offended without punishment due to his age, she demotes herself to the juvenile court to help reform troubled youths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2796
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Try It? Really?
programme.desc: Host Kong Mei-yee travels to different places in Guangdong Province, where she teams up with two partners at each stop to test various dishes as customers to see if they're good value for money, and exploring whether various attractions are worth visiting.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 27
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.desc: Continuing the plot from the previous season of ‘The Escape of the Seven’, the sequel focuses on a man who dreams of becoming a king in a castle built on fake news and the counterattack of seven people escaping evil.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 5
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2201
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 873
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yat-yin, Ying-kit and their team are going to attend a conference. They are abducted on the way. Actually, at Wing-sing’s suggestion, Ying-wai orders Yat-yin and her chums to be abducted and taken to a cargo ship that is heading to the high seas, and they are going to perform liver transplant surgery on his father.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2201
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 14
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 873
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 13
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Vengeance of the Bride - EP 14
programme.desc: Eun Seo Yeon is not rich, but everyone knows she has a warm heart. One day, she discovers that the man, Kang Baek San, whom she calls ‘father’ is actually her real parents’ enemy! She embarks on a revenge journey…

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 5
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: Darkside Of The Moon - EP 7
programme.desc: Wai-wan attends a charity conference organized by socialites. She slyly dismisses a PR manager called Maggie Lam as someone tells her Maggie laughs at her. She hires Moon-yuet as her replacement. Shing Fung finds out The First Steel & Metal Co Ltd has certain issues. Sai-kei tells him to approach Kei-tsun.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 874
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2201
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Yummy, Yummy? Yummy! - EP 6
programme.desc: Modern-day girl Shen Shaoguang (Wang Yinglu) accidentally travels back in time to Yong’an City. She meets Lin Yan (Li Yunrui), the Deputy Magistrate of Jingzhao. After posing as his fiancée to resolve a crisis, a romance blossoms amid culinary ventures.

programme.title: The Queen of Castle - EP 10
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] With Tak-kiu’s help, Yi-ka joins the Zodiac board. Yat-yin suspects Tak-kiu has some ulterior motive. Interpol further confirms Chun-to’s plane crash was due to human factors. Zodiac admits a girl patient with severe dyskeratosis congenita. Yat-yin insists on performing a high-risk simultaneous live donor lung and liver transplant on the child patient.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 22
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2202
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 15
programme.desc: The drama centers Ye Ling Shuang (Peng Xiao Ran) is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her ‘curse’ as well as the Emperor’s demands?

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 874
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Recipes To Live By - EP 5
programme.desc: During the prosperous Tang Dynasty, Ding Yishan became a "hellish food critic" because of his "golden tongue". He was both an enemy and a friend of the famous chef Gai Zhaotian. At the same time, he fell in love with the cheerful Hu woman Shi Rou. They then competed in cooking skills to determine who was better in terms of "taste". Yishan accidentally discovered his background. It turned out that his biological father died unjustly, and Zhaotian and his son were also suspected.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 28
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Speakers Of Law - EP 13
programme.desc: Kam Bing-shun (Kenneth Ma) is a top law student. However, due to a miscarriage of justice, he decides to follow the path to becoming a Legal Executive. By means of his diplomatic and tactful approach, Bing-shun gradually builds his own brand, Adviser Kam. The law firm where Adviser Kam works abruptly faces the prospect of closing down. He uses networking to defuse the situation. He is also invited by lawyers Tin Yau-ka (Lam Ha Mei) and Yu Kwok-tung (Stephen Wong) to join their team.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 19
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 16
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 17

Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 20
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: Revolving Doors of Vengeance - EP 21
programme.desc: Hotel tycoon WONG YUK TING’s family starts a legacy dispute immediately after his death. The third son KAI KIT (NG CHEUK HAI, RON) leaves home. His mother is soon forced to leave by his half brothers. Furthermore, KIT finds out that TING has transferred his hotel shares to a stranger KO FUNG, MARTIN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE). _x000D__x000D_ FUNG comes for revenge. He swears to get hold of the whole hotel.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley is cursed by an evil spirit to not be able to approach any woman. When he falls in love with Siu Yu, Riley's mother decides to use her to help him vanquish the evil spirit. On their wedding night, Riley passes out after protecting Siu Yu from the attack of the evil spirit. Can the two finally break the curse?

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him...

programme.title: Look Out, Officer!
programme.desc: Stephen Chow is a delight in this supernatural action comedy, where a murdered police officer returns from beyond the grave to persuade a rookie cop into avenging his death.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Wing Chun grandmaster Ip Man's matchless fighting skills are revered all over China. Set during the Sino-Japanese War, Ip Man is forced to leave his home and work to support his family. With only his martial arts skills, he reluctantly agrees to train others in the art of Wing Chun for self-defense.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll's eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: How to Pick Girls Up !
programme.desc: Xin, a helpless loser in love, calls in to a radio show hosted by DJ Tsang to ask desperately for help. A self-proclaimed love expert, Tsang takes it upon himself to make sure Xin meets girls and leads him on a series of absurd excursions into the wild and dangerous world of modern love.

programme.title: The Flying Mr. B
programme.desc: Mr. Shi, a secondary PE teacher, accidentally takes a "super pill" invented by the science teacher and gains superpower, turning into Mr. B. He uses his superpower to help the school sports team win the championship and prevent crimes. When the triad is made aware of Mr. B's superpower, they try to gain the super pill for nefarious purposes.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: After provoking the son of a local tyrant, young Wong Fei Hung is sent by his father to train under Drunken Master Beggar So. When his father uncovers the tyrant's plot to sell mines to the Japanese, he becomes a target for assassination. To save his father and stop the sale, Fei Hung must forge his own "Drunken Fist" style to defeat the killers.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Mr. Virgin is a romantic comedy about a twenty-nine year-old man Chao Yu-ting (Alfred Chang) who has seemingly been cursed. He becomes paranoid when a Feng Shui expert tells him it will be unlucky for him to marry before the age of thirty... so comical chaos line the days up to his next birthday!

programme.title: The Bare-footed Kid
programme.desc: A poor, bare-footed young man from the countryside arrives in the city to work with the friend of his dead father. When their dye shop is burnt down by a local strongman, he decides to fight back to protect all of them and save the shop.

programme.title: Cherie
programme.desc: Cherie Chung plays the title character in this sexy romance as a fitness instructor who attracts the attentions of a wealthy businessman and a handsome photographer.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Directed by the acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar Wai, this epic action feature begins in Foshan when Ip Man, the martial arts master from the south, takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond...

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud's successor as the city's guard.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Famous director Ho Meng-hua, who gave Jackie Chan and Sammo Hung acting breaks in his early kung-fu films, broke new ground with his horror hit Oily Maniac. Based on a true story about a creature that kills people at night and covers them in oil, it stars young actor Danny Lee (aka. Li Hsiu-hsien) as the oily maniac. It was considered so scary that it was censored drastically.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei's concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find "The Sutra of 42 Chapters". Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called "Kung Fu Stuntmen". This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then...

programme.title: Fight Back to School
programme.desc: SDU officer Chow Sing Sing goes undercover at a school to locate a missing gun. With his partner Tat, he successfully recovers the weapon, only to stumble upon a munitions smuggling ring. In retaliation, the smugglers storm the school and take students hostage, forcing Sing to risk everything to save them.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Love on Delivery
programme.desc: A delivery boy Yin wants to impress his dream girl Li, so he enrols in a martial arts course to learn strange moves. Being timid, Yin saves Li while wearing a Garfield mask but the credit is stolen by Karate Master, Liu. To prove himself and win Li back, Yin defeats Liu in the ring with his unique martial arts move "Invincible Wind and Fire Spin".

programme.title: Flying Swords of Dragon Gate
programme.desc: This is a remake of the original 1966 classic, Dragon Gate Inn. The country is being policed by the East and West Bureaus, whilst the Emperor's eunuchs have attained much power and control. With all the corruption, Zhao teams up with a group of assassins to systemically kill the eunuchs in order to save the country.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: The Dream of the Red Chamber
programme.desc: Adapted from the most widely read and filmed novel in Chinese history, this version is said to be the most successful one. Betty Loh's looks, demeanour and aura in her portrayal of Lin Dai Yu has won her the epithet "Classic Beauty".

programme.title: Shaolin Abbot
programme.desc: Monk Chi San is sent by his Shaolin Master to learn a special kung fu skill from a Wu Dang priest. He gets embroiled in a fight between the Qing and Ming camps along the way, and has to gather disciples to rebuild the burnt Shaolin temple at the same time.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: This is a love story between an alluring fairy, Seventh Sister, who comes down from heaven to experience life in 70's Hong Kong, and a man who is running a debt laden orphanage. A heartless tycoon plans to take over the orphanage for its land but has to deal with Seventh Sister's magical powers as she aims to protect it from falling into his hands!

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this "young" auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung and the Beauty
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung meets a famous courtesan in Suzhou and in order to spend as much time as possible with her, he builds a direct underground tunnel into the Forbidden City. The emperor's sudden appearances through this direct access shock his people but it is also at this time that he helps the needy and cracks the gambling business in Suzhou.

programme.title: King Gambler
programme.desc: This film was actually a lively forerunner to the gambling film craze, which eventually swept Asian cinema. Here, it's cardsharp versus cardsharp with a lot more kung-fu action, in a battle of wits and fists to become the king of the casino. The double stings and triple crosses raise in complexity and imagination until what started as an unusual box office risk became a top ten hit of 1976.

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Ying Tai disguises herself as a boy to go to school and falls hopelessly in love with her classmate, Shan Bo. After Shan Bo realizes her true identity, he proposes marriage to Ying Tai. However, they are kept apart as she is engaged to another man. Knowing Shan Bo died in despair, Ying Tai is in deep sorrow and kills herself at his grave.

programme.title: Angel with the Iron Fists
programme.desc: Lo Wei directs and stars as the chief detective in this gripping thriller; playing alongside Lily Ho, who excels in the role of an undercover avenger that can fight as well as she flirts! Caught between the crime bosses known as Baldhead and Black Widow, she only has four choices: punch, kick, shoot or bombard with explosives!

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung goes incognito to mix with his people and understand their needs. He encounters many strange things along the way, including being arrested and nearly beheaded. Who will save him?

programme.title: Lady With A Sword
programme.desc: Swordswoman Feng tries to find a group of villains responsible for her eldest sister's death, but is shocked to discover that her fiance, Jin, is one of them. At the same time, Jin's mother and the two other killers are planning to kill Feng. Can Feng fight back and take her revenge?

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: It's a fun and wild romp that mixes pleasure with pleasure. A nightclub owner, playboy Peter Chen Ho, has his ways with three sisters while gallivanting across Asia. Each one has a dangling relationship to save - ensuring a series of mishaps and comic moments.

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre 2
programme.desc: Only by bringing together the powerful Heaven Sword and the mighty Dragon Sabre can six martial arts sects struggling for supremacy be saved in this thrilling sequel to Chu Yuan's original hit.

programme.title: Beyond the Great Wall
programme.desc: Wang Zhao Jun refuses to bribe the imperial painter, so he draws an ugly portrait of her, preventing her from being selected by the Emperor until they meet in person. The painter ends up in exile and plots for Wang to marry the Hun's warlord as a revenge. The Emperor rejects this, provoking a war which is only averted when Wang sacrifices herself.

programme.title: The Pirate
programme.desc: Pirate Chang Pao Chai discovers a leak in his ship after a successful raid on a foreign merchant ship. He goes ashore to get materials to patch up his ship, but encounters corrupt Qing officials oppressing the poor peasants. A good man at heart, he decides to help the peasants and gain a reputation of being a great pirate in the process.

programme.title: Madam White Snake
programme.desc: Linda Lin Dai is perfect as Pak Su-cheng, the stunning snake goddess who assumes a womanly form so that she can taste the pleasures of a human life! Pak seduces young scholar, Hsu Hsien when she recognises him as her saviour in another life 1,000 years ago. But when Buddhist monk Fa Hai finds out about the union, the pair is forced to split...

programme.title: Magnificent Wanderers
programme.desc: Lin and his two friends are traveling patriots who vow to stand up against violence and fight for justice. They meet a rich young man Chu by chance one day and the four become best friends. When a foreign prince plots to possess Chu's family fortune and goes after him, Lin and friends go all out to help Chu fight against the villain.

programme.title: Bat Without Wings
programme.desc: The Bat Without Wings, a notorious rapist-murderer, has returned after a five-year absence. A young swordsman and a convoy master investigate the case and suspect that the Bat may be framed. A saying goes that a treasure map is hidden under the Bat's knife, so they try to use that to hunt the real culprit...

programme.title: Les Belles
programme.desc: Acknowledged as one of the greatest Hong Kong musicals, this lavish movie starring Linda Lin, who won Best Actress for her performance, infuses its wispy plot with style and wit, and the results are pure pleasure.

programme.title: Ambitious Kung Fu Girl
programme.desc: Si Si, a spoiled and naive rich girl with only basic kung fu training, becomes enchanted by the legends of the fearless hero Qin Ge. Determined to escape her father's arranged marriage, she disguises herself as a man and sets out to find him, hoping to challenge Qin Ge-only to be drawn into a deadly plot within the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Tales of Larceny
programme.desc: Connecting all the antics of bosses, monks, beggars, and thieves is the slippery and sinuous efforts of three pickpockets so adept at their chosen skill that they can even trick three beauties of their underwear without missing a step.

programme.title: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Liu serves his triad society loyally and tries to live a respectable life, but over time his good intentions lead him to an all-out gang war with a startling conclusion.

programme.title: The Big Sting
programme.desc: Three buddies find a rare artifact known as the Double-Faced God but are poisoned by Lady Wu who steals the treasure from them. Before they die, they get their wives to promise to train their children to take back what is rightfully theirs. These kids grow up to exact a vengeance that turns out to be more hilarious than horrific in this comedy.

programme.title: Shaolin Mantis
programme.desc: The Emperor orders Feng to find proofs of Master Tian's rebellion in his house. Feng falls in love with Tian's granddaughter and marries her. When he finds the proofs and tries to leave with her, his wife is killed in the fight against Tian. Feng creates the mantis-style martial arts and vows to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Lark
programme.desc: Sixties pop star Carrie Ku plays the "Little Lark" in this romantic-drama of mistaken identity that is a treasure trove of some of the most popular Mandarin songs of all time.

programme.title: The Dragon Creek
programme.desc: This wuxia murder mystery film talks about a young girl whose father was ruthlessly murdered during China's early republican era. She has a list of villains who have been plotting against her father and together with her elder brother, the young girl sets out on a journey to hunt down the secret serial killer.

programme.title: The 82 Tenants
programme.desc: Continuing the success of the classic comedy "House of 72 tenants", this sequel tells the stories of tenants living in an old building in Hong Kong who are forced to evict by the developers. Some tenants prefer to take the compensation while some resist the move. Will the acquisitions plan destroy the harmony of the neighborhood?

programme.title: Shadow Girl
programme.desc: A young swordswoman becomes invisible during the day and a monster at night after taking her grandma's pill. She ruined the wedding of a bandit chief's daughter using her powers and is hunted down by them for revenge. Will she escape the hunt?

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: During World War II, a singer was raped and killed by Master Tao during her escape, with all her valuables stolen as well. Since then, the Tao's house became haunted. Years later, Master Tao's descendant sells the house to a young couple to pay off a massive gambling debt, but the couple soon discover that it is haunted by the vengeful spirit...

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural "Bloody Parrot". Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.title: Super Taste
programme.desc: Super Taste is a food and travel program that takes you across Taiwan and around the world, discovering local delicacies and experiencing the most authentic travel adventures.

programme.title: TVBS News
programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: News Frontline
programme.desc: This program covers major global and local news events each day.

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Hu's Travel Agency
programme.desc: Hu's Travel Agency features TV host Hu Gua with his children Hsiao-Chen and Hu Shih-An, running Taiwan's "most human-centered travel agency." Centered in Miaoli, they blend family bonds and local culture to create heartfelt journeys.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 14
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: The Inn 4 - EP 7
programme.desc: Escape to a seaside inn where life slows down and joy takes over. Watch friends run a charming getaway, uncover surprises, and share heartfelt moments in a journey about companionship, healing, and the beauty of living well.

programme.title: Detective Chinatown 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Tang Ren (Wang Baoqiang) lures Qin Feng (Liu Haoran) to New York for the World Detective Contest with prize money. The contest involves finding the murderer of the grandson of chinatown's 'godfather'. The duo teams up again risking lives to solve the case!

programme.title: Call Me By Fire 3 - EP 14
programme.desc: This season upholds the panoramic competition style of its predecessors, intensifying the competitive edge. The brothers' perseverance embodies the essence of male determination and charm.

programme.title: Only For Love - EP 15
programme.desc: Hardworking financial reporter Zheng Shu Yi (Bai Lu) is determined to land a front-page story with Shi Yan (Dylan Wang) a successful young CEO that the whole city is talking about. She pulls all the stops, eventually gets through to him and even love blossoms.

programme.title: Perfect Match 12 - EP 51
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China.
